name: little-nour
description: Little Nour — A cute drawing-puzzle adventure game

scripts.build: shx rm -rf www && shx mkdir -p www && shx cp index.html www/ && shx cp -r css www/css && shx cp -r js www/js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android

author: Little Nour Team
